overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk metropolis at night, beginning in industrial outskirts, passing through narrow neon-lit alleys adorned with traditional red lanterns, and culminating at a bustling intersection dominated by a futuristic circular building with glowing red tiers.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow alley dense with neon signage, traditional red paper lanterns, and steam rising from vents. Pedestrians are visible along the sides.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley onto a wider commercial street with closed storefronts and vending machines. The street leads toward a traditional gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection approach with elevated highways and futuristic circular building

elevated highway structure crossing above the street
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection dominated by a futuristic circular building with red neon tiers. Elevated highways and large digital billboards frame the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling intersection with futuristic circular market building and heavy neon signage

yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: At the bustling intersection, the circular building with glowing red tiers dominates the center. Vehicles pass through while pedestrians cross the wet streets reflecting the neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial periphery into the heart of a vibrant, neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on wet asphalt in a foggy industrial district, moving toward a distant processing tower under the glow of orange street lighting. As the camera turns into a narrow alleyway, the open space tightens into a corridor of graffiti-covered walls and rising steam, where the lighting shifts to a dense array of neon signs and traditional red paper lanterns. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the alley onto a commercial street lined with vending machines, passing through a traditional gate toward a massive urban intersection. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a bustling hub dominated by a futuristic circular building with glowing red tiers, framed by elevated highways and digital billboards reflecting off the rain-slicked streets.
